summary: Iteration 10 testing complete - All features verified: Preset avatar library (DiceBear API), In-app file viewer with co-viewing mode. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.

minor.issue: Fixed: avatar_url was not being cleared when set to null due to exclude_none=True in model_dump(). Added explicit handling for avatar_url=None.

critical_code_review_comments: AvatarPicker.jsx correctly implements 12 DiceBear styles with 24 seeds each (288 total avatar options)
FileViewerModal.jsx correctly categorizes files by mime_type and extension (image/video/pdf/other)
FileViewerModal has 'Present to Table' button that sends present_start WS message
WebSocket handler in server.py relays present_start/present_sync/present_stop to table members
Settings page avatar area is clickable with camera icon overlay (data-testid='settings-avatar-edit')
Avatar selection shows blue border + check mark for selected avatar
seed_data_creation: Created test shared item 'Test Image for FileViewer' in Family Circle table for FileViewerModal testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 complete. Two major features verified: (1) Preset avatar library using DiceBear API - 12 styles x 24 seeds, picker modal in Settings with style tabs and grid layout. Avatar selection shows blue border + check mark. 'Save Avatar' saves avatar_url to user profile, 'Use Initials' clears it. (2) In-app file viewer for shared items - FileViewerModal opens for items with url property, shows image/video/PDF content based on file type. Has close button, download button, and 'Present to Table' button. Co-viewing syncs via WebSocket present_start/present_sync/present_stop messages. Bug fixed: PUT /api/me now correctly handles avatar_url=null to clear avatar.

co_viewing_websocket.behavior: Relays presentation events to all table members (excluding sender)

regression.sidebar_navigation: All 7 nav items work (Portal, Calendar, Messages, Walkie, Call History, Apps, Contacts)
